meta.notes: Fresh session on pika-lts-env (env_014sNRKczin3E3RJzUJGUABY). long-to-short-video scripts installed via init_script (base64-embedded, 7 files: long_to_short.py + downloader.py + transcriber.py + video_processor.py + clip_selector.py + uploader.py + utils.py). Agent pika-lts (agent_011CZvNuRgTCRuUoTtYy59hv) with nova3-common skill. T1→T2→T3→T4 ran sequentially using nohup+poll pattern (required — fresh runs take ~220-273s, over the 295s bash timeout). T4 poll crashed once at 219.95s ('tool execution interrupted by crash') — agent retried and found done file; T4_ms correctly measured from nohup launch time. T4 requested 5 clips; LLM returned 4 (207s source not enough for 5 distinct segments). AV1 hw decode unavailable — H264 mmco warnings in stderr; face timeline ~22s (not 60s). Session: sesn_011CZvNv4LbAYjNgcsX4PfJE.

test_input.name: matt-cutts-30days
test_input.description: Matt Cutts — Try Something New for 30 Days (TED Talk, 3m27s)

task.name: long-to-short-video
task.purpose: Download YouTube video, select best clips via LLM, reframe 9:16, burn captions, upload to CDN
task.expected_output: 3-5 short MP4 clips (9:16) with virality scores and CDN URLs

install.notes: long-to-short-video scripts installed via pika-lts-env init_script (base64-embedded at container creation time). nova3-common (skill_01WVFxRuNsjXYwW9Tz7Q2Nks) mounted at /workspace/skills/nova3-common. pip deps: requests, opencv-python-headless, yt-dlp. apt: ffmpeg. Whisper transcription routes via Pika proxy (whisper-1 API call) — no local whisper install.

asset_acquisition.notes: No pre-download. S1 stage downloads the video internally as part of each fresh run (via Apify dc_solutions~youtube-downloader-pro proxy).

steps.name: t1_fresh_3clips_tiktok
steps.notes: script_ms=231584. s1_apify_s=37 (dc_solutions~youtube-downloader-pro, run KSE1tm01XAHTvPIFI, SUCCEEDED at 37s). s1_download_s=0 (instant presigned URL, 8MB). s1_face_s=~22 (104 samples, 8 no-face intervals detected). s2_whisper_s=12 (482 words). s3_llm_s=11 (3 clips selected, scores 8.7/7.9/6.8). s4s5s6s7_per_clip_s=~50 (3 clips × ~50s avg = ~150s). clips=3. CDN: a89917de.../clip_01 (vir=8.7, 59.18s), 43123cab.../clip_02 (vir=7.9, 43.62s), e441b1aa.../clip_03 (vir=6.8, 50.0s).

steps.name: t2_cache_hit
steps.notes: script_ms=7795. cache_status=hit. S1 video cache hit (8MB already downloaded). S1 face timeline loaded from cache (104 samples). S2 transcript loaded from cache (482 words). S3 clips loaded from cache (LLM skipped). S4-S7 all loaded from checkpoint — identical CDN URLs returned. 29× speedup vs T1 (7.8s vs 231.6s).

steps.name: t3_fresh_3clips_hormozi
steps.notes: script_ms=217072. s1_apify_s=37 (run erJFYSIbSgpgvEEWx, SUCCEEDED at 37s). s1_download_s=0 (8MB instant). s1_face_s=~22. s2_whisper_s=12 (482 words). s3_llm_s=9 (3 clips selected, scores 8.7/7.2/5.0). s4s5s6s7_per_clip_s=~46 (3 clips × ~46s = ~138s). clips=3. hormozi bold caption style. CDN: d6a2fff4.../clip_01, 89255365.../clip_02, 2eb102a2.../clip_03.

steps.name: t4_fresh_5clips_tiktok
steps.notes: script_ms=272710. s1_apify_s=53 (run WJX8r2xhfxQhPptLz, server 500 → retry, SUCCEEDED at 53s). s1_download_s=0. s1_face_s=~22. s2_whisper_s=9 (483 words). s3_llm_s=14 (requested 5 clips; LLM returned 4, scores 9.1/8.2/5.0/5.0 — 207s video insufficient for 5 distinct segments). s4s5s6s7_per_clip_s=~44 (4 clips × ~44s = ~174s). clips=4. CDN: 027b3942.../clip_01, 54744f13.../clip_02, 1372c100.../clip_03, d70f9c6f.../clip_04. NOTE: T4 poll bash call crashed at ~220s (tool execution interrupted) — agent retried poll and found done file; T4_ms accurately measured from nohup launch timestamp stored in /tmp/t4_start_ns.txt.

execution.notes: All 4 runs sequential (T1→T2→T3→T4). Each fresh run used nohup+background+poll (required: T1=231.6s, T3=217.1s, T4=272.7s all exceed 295s bash timeout limit). Sequential sum of script times = 729.2s. tool_calls_s (sum of all bash call durations incl. setup/polling/parse) = 701.7s. T2 poll was direct bash (7.8s well under timeout). T4 nohup launch used /tmp/t4_start_ns.txt for accurate timing past poll crash.

delivery.notes: CDN upload is S7 inside the skill script (not a separate phase). T1+T2+T3+T4 produced 10 unique clip CDN URLs total (T2 reuses T1's 3 CDN URLs). output_url = T1 clip 1 CDN URL (partial, trimmed by bash output buffer).
